subject: [PATCH 08/10] nfsd: fix partial-write detection in nfsd_direct_write

2026-05-28.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the nfsd_direct_write function, which is responsible for handling direct writes to NFS servers. The issue was that partial-write detection was not working correctly, allowing short writes to complete between 50% and 99% of the segment size without breaking the loop. This caused the next segment's payload to be written at the wrong offset and over-reporting the count to the NFS client. To fix this, a snapshot of the segment's byte count is taken before writing, and host_err is compared against this snapshot instead of the original request length. This ensures that any short write breaks the loop as expected.
